# shunt

> Claude Code LLM gateway documentation for routing selected model IDs to Anthropic-compatible or OpenAI Responses providers while preserving the Claude Code harness.

## Onboarding

- [Contributor Guide](./src/content/docs/onboarding/contributor-guide.md) — /onboarding/contributor-guide
- [Executive Guide](./src/content/docs/onboarding/executive-guide.md) — /onboarding/executive-guide
- [Onboarding](./src/content/docs/onboarding/index.md) — /onboarding
- [Product Manager Guide](./src/content/docs/onboarding/product-manager-guide.md) — /onboarding/product-manager-guide
- [Staff Engineer Guide](./src/content/docs/onboarding/staff-engineer-guide.md) — /onboarding/staff-engineer-guide
